title: Shijing: Yan Yan (The Swallows)
description: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.
introduction: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.

translation.text: The swallows go flying about, with their wings unevenly displayed. The lady was returning to her native state. I escorted her far into the country. I gazed after her till I could no longer see her, and my tears fell down like rain.
